info.name: Procest
info.summary: Case management for Nextcloud powered by OpenRegister
info.description:
A Nextcloud app for case management.
Procest provides a lightweight case management interface on top of OpenRegister, supporting cases, tasks, statuses, roles, results, and decisions.
- Manage cases with full CRUD support - Track tasks within cases - Configurable statuses and roles - Multilingual (English and Dutch) - Thin client architecture — all data stored in OpenRegister
Requires the OpenRegister app to be installed and enabled.
info.author: Conduction
